summary: Customer testimonial from Luellen McEwan praising the Cavallo Western All-Purpose Saddle Pad for fitting multiple horse breeds and being easy to clean.
Short testimonial from S. Walden in Honolulu praising Cavallo Total Comfort System saddle pads for even sweat distribution and preventing a sore back on daily patrol.
Endurance rider Karen Badger (Team Canada) testimonial on the Cavallo Total Comfort System Endurance saddle pad relieving her horse's back tenderness on 100-mile races.
Champion cutter Les Timmons testimonial endorsing Cavallo All-Purpose and Built-Up saddle pads for support, feel, and easy care.
Veterinarian Dr. Nicholas Kleider testimonial recommending Cavallo Total Comfort System Saddle Pads for relieving equine back pain and uneven weight distribution.
Cavallo president Carole Herder testimonial on the Total Comfort System Saddle Pad, noting she developed the pads using the finest materials.
Customer testimonial from Jeremie Roach praising Cavallo Western All-Purpose and Barrel/Stock saddle pads for close-contact feel and horse comfort.
Dressage champion Leslie Reid testimonial on the Cavallo Total Comfort System Saddle Pad keeping her dressage horses' backs comfortable during training.
Customer testimonial from Samantha Schultz on the Cavallo Saddle Pad improving horse feel and performance, crediting it for her 2004 Coombs Bull-O-Rama championship.
Customer testimonial from Kayla Cottrell on the Cavallo Saddle Pad protecting her barrel racing horse's back over a 3-day weekend.
Brief testimonial noting Cody Sapergia uses the Cavallo Western All-Purpose Saddle Pad #1001 to improve saddle fit across multiple horses.
Customer testimonial from Pamela Warmack on Cavallo SIMPLE Hoof Boots enabling rides on rocky trails and through streams without harming her horses' bare feet.
